function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-06
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-06                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write completed successfully. The reactive outbox check is not applicable because no outbox document was written. Next required workflow step is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: The target invoice file was updated with YAML frontmatter and preserved original body in a single write.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by migrating the requested invoice to schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving the original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS for each entered folder, used OCR+migration workflows and finance schema, preserved full original body under frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR and add frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md. The source note contained all required invoice fields and line items defined by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling a complete, exact migration without guessing. After successful write, inbox workflow required deleting the processed item.
